dialogue.speaker: Freja
dialogue.text: Hej Jonas, hvad skal vi spise i dag?

dialogue.speaker: Jonas
dialogue.text: Jeg vil gerne have en stor pizza med skinke. Og dig?

dialogue.speaker: Freja
dialogue.text: Jeg tager en lækker salat og et glas vand.

dialogue.speaker: Jonas
dialogue.text: Det lyder godt. Skal vi også have kaffe bagefter?

dialogue.speaker: Freja
dialogue.text: Ja tak, og måske et stykke kage!

dialogue.speaker: Jonas
dialogue.text: Perfekt, jeg kalder på tjeneren nu.

translation.speaker: Freja
translation.text: Hi Jonas, what are we eating today?

translation.speaker: Jonas
translation.text: I would like a large pizza with ham. And you?

translation.speaker: Freja
translation.text: I will have a delicious salad and a glass of water.

translation.speaker: Jonas
translation.text: That sounds good. Shall we also have coffee afterwards?

translation.speaker: Freja
translation.text: Yes please, and maybe a piece of cake!

translation.speaker: Jonas
translation.text: Perfect, I will call the waiter now.
